title: Smoky Bean Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious vegan bowl filled with smoky beans and topped with aerated slaw.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together the black beans, smoked paprika, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Transfer the bean mixture to a baking dish and roast for 15 minutes.
While the beans are roasting, massage the kale with your hands for 2-3 minutes to tenderize it.
In a separate bowl, mix together the slaw mix, lime juice, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of the roasted beans on the bottom, followed by a spoonful of the slaw.
Top with chopped kale and serve immediately.
Optional: add your favorite toppings such as sliced avocado, diced tomatoes, or chopped nuts.
